headline: Does GE’s (GE) Arbitration Outcome Quietly Reshape the Risk Lens on Its Aerospace Engine Backlog?
summary: In early July 2026, Malakoff Corporation Berhad announced that an arbitral tribunal at SIAC dismissed both Prai Power’s claim against several GE entities and the GE entities’ counterclaim, with each party bearing its own legal costs and no material financial impact expected for Malakoff. The tribunal’s decision leaves a second, separate claim unresolved, meaning GE still faces the possibility of further proceedings if it elects to pursue Claim 2. We’ll now examine how expectations around GE...
